All 8 Tier 1 failures were false positives: items 1-4 from incorrect grep patterns/wrong target file; items 5-8 from directory-path grep errors.

fast_checks.evidence: certificate-metadata.mjs:49 mappings include '{{course_title}}' mapped from inputData.course_title; template has name field
certificate-metadata.mjs:81-83 overrides hardcoded description with inputData.description if provided; the field is configurable
certificate-metadata.mjs:76-78 renames course.teacher to course.instructor post-template; instructor field is present in output metadata

fast_checks.description: F-05: soul-bound constraint present in minting-policy.mjs (nft-minting-policy.hl)
fast_checks.evidence: DRIFTED: web3/contracts/nft-minting-policy.hl has NO soul-bound or transfer restriction. Policy only enforces: (1) tx.is_signed_by(ownerPkh), (2) tx.time_range.start < lockTime, (3) qty >= 0 (prevents burn). No restriction on NFT transfer. minting-policy.mjs compiles this contract. NFT certificates are freely tradeable on-chain.

fast_checks.description: F-05: soul-bound constraint present in certificate-metadata.mjs
fast_checks.evidence: certificate-metadata.mjs:85 sets assetData.non_transferable = true in the on-chain metadata under '// F-05 soul-bound: mark as non-transferable per CIP-0068 convention'. The metadata field is present. NOTE: this is metadata-only — the minting policy does not enforce it on-chain.

fast_checks.description: F-05/F-06: CertificateService reads enrolled_certificate_enabled snapshot column
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:99-101 calls history->effectiveCertificateName(), effectiveCertificateDescription(), effectiveCertificateImageUrl() methods on CourseHistory model; CourseHistory.php:162-163 these methods read enrolled_certificate_enabled to determine which value to return

fast_checks.description: F-06: CertificateService reads enrolled_token_reward_amount snapshot column
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:113-114 calls history->effectiveTokenRewardAmount() which reads enrolled_token_reward_amount at CourseHistory.php:222-223

fast_checks.description: F-05/F-06: config lock — rejects post-enrollment edits with 422
fast_checks.evidence: CourseController.php:444 returns HTTP 422 with 'Reward configuration cannot be changed after enrollment.' for certificate config updates; TokenRewardController.php:35-41 returns HTTP 422 with same message for token reward config updates. Lock is in the controller layer, not CertificateService — Tier 1 grep targeted the wrong file.

fast_checks.description: F-10: airdrop guard references blocking statuses {delivered, self_minted, pending}
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:74 in_array check covers ['minted', 'self_minted', 'minting', 'pending', 'revoked'] under lockForUpdate(). All required blocking statuses present. Tier 1 grep for 'delivered' failed but the status value in code is 'minted' which maps to 'Delivered' label — the guard is correct.

fast_checks.description: F-10: airdrop guard permits delivery when certificate_status is null or failed
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:74-80 — null (no row or null status) and 'failed' pass through the blocking guard and proceed to mint

fast_checks.description: F-16: RewardInvalidationService sets certificate_status to revoked
F-16: RewardInvalidationService sets token_reward_status to clawback_flagged
F-16: RewardInvalidationService calls revoke-certificate-tx script for on-chain update
fast_checks.evidence: RewardInvalidationService.php:79-100: when certificateRevoked and certificate_tx_hash and certificate_policy_id are set, calls $this->certificateService->revokeCertificateOnChain() at line 85; CertificateService.php:867 builds and executes 'run/revoke-certificate-tx.mjs' command. On-chain revocation IS wired. Tier 1 grep searched the wrong method name.

F-07: build-certificate-tx.mjs mints both NFT and token in single transaction
fast_checks.evidence: build-certificate-tx.mjs: line 44 tokenName = args[7] || null; line 45 tokenQuantity = args[8]; line 60 includeToken = tokenName !== null && tokenQuantity > 0n; lines 130-162 when includeToken: adds token to nftTokens array at line 131, adds token output to recipient at lines 154-161. Single tx.mintTokens call at line 135 mints all tokens. Single Blockfrost submission. F-07 IS implemented.

fast_checks.evidence: Certificates.jsx:17 imports AirdropFeeDialog; :37-39 feeData state; :68-86 handleAirdropClick fetches estimate and opens dialog; :258-266 renders AirdropFeeDialog with feeData prop

Retry flow is architecturally sound. Tier 1 checked for AirdropFeeDialog import inside AirdropResultsDialog.jsx but it is wired via parent component.

post_conditions.description: Teachers enable/configure/disable NFT certificate reward; required metadata fields validated; soul-bound enforced; config locked at enrollment
post_conditions.evidence: Metadata validation present for all 6 required fields (name, image, description, course_id, instructor, student_name). Config lock at enrollment confirmed in CourseController.php:444. Soul-bound metadata field present in certificate-metadata.mjs:85 (non_transferable=true). REMAINING GAP: soul-bound is metadata-only — nft-minting-policy.hl has no transfer restriction on-chain. The Helios script enforces only owner signature and time lock; certificates can be transferred on-chain despite the metadata field.

post_conditions.description: Teachers enable/configure/disable token reward; invalid amounts rejected; config locked at enrollment
post_conditions.evidence: Token amount validation present. enrolled_token_reward_amount snapshot read via effectiveTokenRewardAmount(). Enrollment config lock confirmed in TokenRewardController.php:35-41 returning HTTP 422.

post_conditions.description: NFT and token rewards configured independently and delivered together in a single on-chain transaction
post_conditions.evidence: build-certificate-tx.mjs:44-45 accepts optional tokenName/tokenQuantity args; :60 includeToken flag; :131 adds token to the single mintTokens call; :154-161 adds token output in same transaction. Single Blockfrost submission for both NFT and token. A failure in that single transaction counts as one retryable failure.

post_conditions.description: Batch/selective airdrop with fee estimate before confirmation; partial failures with retry; duplicate prevention; platform wallet pays; teacher wallet not charged
post_conditions.evidence: AirdropFeeDialog wired in Certificates.jsx with fee estimate before confirm. AirdropResultsDialog onRetryFailed re-triggers AirdropFeeDialog via parent. Duplicate guard at CertificateService.php:74 uses lockForUpdate() blocking ['minted', 'self_minted', 'minting', 'pending', 'revoked']. Platform wallet (OWNER_WALLET_ADDR) pays fees. Teacher wallet not involved in airdrop path.

post_conditions.description: On refund, certificate status set to revoked (triggering on-chain update) and token flagged for clawback; values not overwritten
post_conditions.evidence: RewardInvalidationService.php:65 sets certificate_status='revoked'; :71 sets token_reward_status='clawback_flagged'. On-chain revocation: RewardInvalidationService.php:79-100 calls certificateService->revokeCertificateOnChain() which executes revoke-certificate-tx.mjs — non-fatal on failure (DB already updated). Idempotency via rewards_invalidated_at guard.

post_conditions.description: RewardsTable renders reward type, amount, delivery status from required set, wallet destination from wallet_type
post_conditions.evidence: STATUS_CONFIG covers eligible, pending, minting, minted (shown as 'Delivered'), failed, revoked, not_eligible. wallet_type read at line 200 (primary, with wallet_destination fallback). REMAINING GAP: clawback_flagged absent from STATUS_CONFIG — renders as raw string via default handler, not as a styled chip with defined color/label.

post_conditions.description: Student self-mint via CIP-30 wallet; server builds tx; student signs; server merges and submits; self_minted on success; failed on failure; no custodial fallback
post_conditions.evidence: StudentMintController builds tx server-side; signTx partial=true browser-side; submit-signed-tx.mjs server-side merge; self_minted/failed status recorded; no custodial fallback confirmed.

post_conditions.description: CourseCompleteConfirmation shows eligibility notification and badge; cleared after reward receipt
post_conditions.evidence: CourseCompleteConfirmation.jsx:409-411 certPending, tokenPending, hasEligibilityBadge computed correctly. isAlreadyMinted determines terminal state. Badge rendered when hasEligibilityBadge true; absent when false.

invariants.description: Only completed students eligible for airdrop/self-mint
invariants.evidence: StudentMintController.php whereNotNull('completed_at') before any mint; CertificateController.php filters completed students for airdrop eligibility

invariants.description: Minting policy supports on-chain metadata updates for revocation
invariants.evidence: revoke-certificate-tx.mjs exists; CertificateService.php:867 builds and executes it; same policy used for revocation updates

invariants.description: Platform wallet pays all airdrop fees; teacher wallet never charged
invariants.evidence: build-certificate-tx.mjs uses OWNER_WALLET_ADDR for UTxO selection; teacher wallet not referenced in airdrop path

invariants.description: CIP-30 self-mint uses partial sign flow
invariants.evidence: StudentMintController builds + owner-signs server-side; CourseCompleteConfirmation.jsx:110 walletAPI.signTx(buildResult.cborTx, true); server merges via submit-signed-tx.mjs

invariants.description: NFT certificates are soul-bound; soul-bound constraint in minting-policy.mjs and certificate-metadata.mjs
invariants.evidence: certificate-metadata.mjs:85 sets non_transferable=true in on-chain metadata (partial compliance). However nft-minting-policy.hl has NO transfer restriction — only owner signature and time lock. The minting policy does not prevent on-chain transfer of minted NFTs. Invariant requires enforcement in BOTH files; the on-chain enforcement is absent.

agent_checks.summary: F-07 converged (token+NFT in single tx confirmed). F-10 converged (fee dialog wired, retry flow confirmed, airdrop guard correct). F-16 converged (on-chain revocation via revokeCertificateOnChain confirmed). F-18 converged. F-19 converged. F-06 converged (enrollment lock confirmed). F-05 partial: soul-bound metadata field present but minting policy has no on-chain transfer restriction. F-17 partial: clawback_flagged absent from STATUS_CONFIG. Soul-bound invariant violated: nft-minting-policy.hl enforces no transfer restriction. 11 Tier 1 failures were false positives from incorrect grep patterns or wrong target files — all have been re-verified manually.
